name: Pika API
what_it_does: AI video generation API that creates short video clips from text prompts or images. Pika 1.5 and 2.0 produce 3-5 second high-quality video clips with natural motion, scene transitions, and visual effects. API access enables agent-driven content creation pipelines to programmatically generate video content at scale.
use_cases: Generate short video clips from text prompts for agent-driven social media content automation
Animate product images into video clips for agent-managed e-commerce content pipelines
Create visual effect overlays and scene generations for agent-produced video content
Produce explainer video clips from agent-generated scripts for marketing automation
Generate video thumbnails and preview clips for agent content management systems
not_for: Long-form video content — Pika generates 3-5 second clips; not suitable for full-length video
Photorealistic brand-controlled video — generative quality varies and has limited controllability
Real-time video generation — rendering takes minutes per clip
best_when: You need accessible, consumer-friendly AI video generation for creative content automation with a clean API and competitive pricing.
avoid_when: You need the absolute highest motion quality (Luma Dream Machine or Runway), long-form video, or precise visual control.

auth.notes: API key in Authorization Bearer header. Access via Pika developer program — API access may require waitlist approval.

pricing.paid_tiers: Credit-based pricing; approximately $0.008-0.02 per second of generated video
pricing.notes: Credit-based per-video pricing. API access pricing may differ from consumer plans. Developer API access requires application/approval.

performance.rate_limits: Queue-based async model; concurrent generation limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Asynchronous video generation model. API documentation is less comprehensive than established providers. Error responses are basic but functional.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Generation creates new job IDs — not idempotent. Track generation IDs to avoid duplicate generations.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires developer program approval — not immediately available to all users
Video generation is asynchronous — poll for completion or configure webhooks
Generated video URLs are temporary — download immediately after generation completes
Content moderation may reject prompts without detailed error explanation
API capabilities may lag behind consumer product features as developer API is less mature

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Content moderation for generated video. No SOC2 publicly confirmed.
